description: ERC4626 vaults that do not guard against free-asset donations can skew `totalAssets` and share price. Attackers can donate assets to inflate share value and then mint shares cheaply before normalization, extracting value from existing holders.
name: ERC4626 Share Inflation via Donations
remediation: - Normalize share price on every deposit/mint using current `totalAssets`. - Optionally block unsolicited donations by reverting on direct transfers or sweeping them into reserves before new share mints. - Add tests for donation and price-per-share edge cases.
